isValidCoordinate(int, int) - Static method in class com.sudoku.util.InputValidator
Validates if the coordinates are within the 9x9 board boundaries.
isValidNumber(String) - Static method in class com.sudoku.util.InputValidator
Checks if a given string is a valid Sudoku number (1-9).
isValidValue(int) - Static method in class com.sudoku.util.InputValidator
Checks if a numeric value is valid for a Sudoku cell (0-9, where 0 is empty).
